DomainData.MainInfoText: When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
DomainData.AlertNoticeText: By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. View our Cookie Policy
DomainData.AlertMoreInfoTextDialog: Cookies Settings, Opens the preference center dialog

Groups.GroupDescription: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Groups.GroupDescriptionOTT: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Groups.GroupDescription: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Groups.GroupDescriptionOTT: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Groups.GroupDescription: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Groups.GroupDescriptionOTT: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Groups.GroupDescription: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Groups.GroupDescriptionOTT: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Groups.GroupDescription: These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.
Groups.GroupDescriptionOTT: These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.

jsonFull.custom_styles: {{i:klarna_fonts_link}}<style>html,body,p {margin: 0}.link {text-decoration: underline;white-space: nowrap;background: none;border: none;padding: 0;cursor: pointer;}.nowrap {white-space: nowrap;}.logo {font-family: "Klarna Headline";font-weight: bold;}.container {display: flex;flex-direction: column;justify-content: center;align-items: stretch;box-sizing: border-box;}.legal {margin-top: 4px;}.legal.uk {font-size: inherit;line-height: inherit;color: inherit;}/* customizations */.container {font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;text-align: left;color: #17120F;font-size: 12px;font-weight: 400;font-style: normal;line-height: 20px;background-color: #FFFFFF;border-style: solid;border-color: #ffffff;border-radius: 0px;border-width: 0px;padding-left: 14px;padding-right: 14px;padding-top: 0px;padding-bottom: 0px;}.link {font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;color: #17120F;font-size: 12px;font-weight: 400;}.legal {color: #17120F;font-size: 12px;font-weight: 400;line-height: 20px;}.logo {color: #17120f;}.container {flex-direction: row;justify-content: flex-start;align-items: center;}.text-wrapper {margin-left: 14px;margin-right: 0px;}.badge {display: flex;align-items: center;}@media (max-width: 200px) {.container {flex-wrap: wrap;justify-content: flex-start;}.text-wrapper {margin-top: 14px;margin-left: 0;}}.badge-container {display: flex;flex-direction: inherit;justify-content: center;align-items: center;}.badge-text-wrapper {margin-left: 5px;margin-right: 5px;}#osm-deal-badge {display: none;}</style>

Results.ReviewText: It fits nicely in my hand, much lighter than my previous mouse.
Results.Title: Awesome mouse

Results.ReviewText: Very uncomfortable to grip and use. I have a G305 and a G502 both of which are comfortable. The design of this mouse puts pressure on my pinky finger, makes my hand sore within 30 minutes of use.
Results.Title: Uncomfortable design for Right handed users

Results.ReviewText: Fantastic mouse. Very light and very responsive for gaming. Although the price is a little ridiculous.
Results.Title: Fantastic mouse. Very light and very responsive for gaming. Altho

ClientResponses.Response: We're glad to hear that your son is enjoying it so much that he won't stop talking about it. At Logitech, we strive to create products that bring joy and satisfaction to our users. We appreciate your support and hope your son continues to enjoy his gaming experience with the Superlight 2.

Results.ReviewText: Bought it for my son and he won’t shut up about it lol
Results.Title: Fastest mouse on the planet earth

ClientResponses.Response: Thank you for your feedback on the PRO X Superlight 2! We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the first iteration and found the improvements in the Superlight 2 to be even better. We always strive to enhance our products and provide our customers with top-quality gaming equipment. Thank you for choosing Logitech!

Results.ReviewText: After enjoying the first iteration of the superlight, i was pleased to find out that the superlight 2 improves upon what i liked about the first one.
Results.Title: Its just better than the previous iteration

ClientResponses.Response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We are thrilled to hear the PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2 - White is working well and meeting your expectations. Your feedback helps us continue to improve and innovate. We truly appreciate your support of Logitech.

Results.ReviewText: Very good mouse. I’d you like this shape, you will like this mouse. Very high quality. However if you don’t like the shape, you will hate this mouse. Some people may say that the viper v3 is better or death adder is better, but it’s all personal preference with the shape of the mice. If you like the shape then get this mouse
Results.Title: Amazing mouse

Results.ReviewText: Worst buying experience ever in this page almoat 3 weeks to get the item
Results.Title: Worst buying experience ever

Results.ReviewText: Best mouse ever. Has insane accuracy, and it just feels smooth when playing games competitively.
Results.Title: Best mouse ever

910-006628.Name: PRO X SUPERLIGHT 2
910-006628.Description: Introducing the next evolution of a pro gaming icon—now faster and more precise. Our championship-winning 60g gaming mouse was designed in collaboration with the world’s leading pro gamers to break down any barrier between you and the win.

Results.ReviewText: Best mouse ever. Has insane accuracy, and it just feels smooth when playing games competitively.
Results.Title: Best mouse ever

Results.ReviewText: It was a great mouse lightweight i bought it for my office work cuz I didn’t want to spend 20 bucks on a junky mouse. I bought it on sale for 140 and it is by far the best mouse when pared with a great mousepad.
Results.Title: Best mouse ever. I could clip Peterbot with this

response.summary: The product features an ultra-lightweight design under 60 grams, providing effortless movement and reduced fatigue during long gaming sessions. The HERO 2 sensor delivers precise tracking with a DPI range up to 32,000, and the LIGHTSPEED wireless technology ensures a lag-free experience. Reviewers praise the impressive battery life and customizable buttons, as well as the ergonomic shape for comfort during extended use. While a few customers have reported minor issues, the majority of reviews are overwhelmingly positive, considering this one of the best wireless gaming mice available.
response.title: REVIEW_SUMMARY
response.disclaimer: This summary is generated by artificial intelligence based on customer reviews
